source: duolingodata.com/dat/plfen67v2.html — Duolingo 'Polish from English' current learning path, Section 1 (CEFR Intro), fetched 2026-07-09
note: Scope-and-sequence guide, not gospel (SPEC.md §3) — unit objectives are verified from the live current-path source; per-unit vocab/grammar below is our own reasonable elaboration for the Serbian course, informed by the objective text and the legacy duome.eu skill-name conventions (Basics, Common Phrases, Animals, Food, etc.). Luka's native-speaker QA on units 1-3's actual generated content (item 4) is the real correctness gate — this file only sets scope, not literal Serbian sentences.

units.title: Form basic sentences
vocabFocus: simple nouns: man, woman, water, bread

units.title: Describe animals
vocabFocus: common animals: dog, cat, bird, fish, horse

units.title: Talk about food
vocabFocus: food and drink: bread, water, coffee, milk, apple
grammarFocus: accusative case for direct objects (intro) — this is where displayed word forms start diverging from lemmas, e.g. 'vodu' not 'voda'

units.title: Use demonstratives
grammarFocus: demonstrative pronouns agreeing with noun gender

units.title: Form the plural
grammarFocus: plural noun endings (full pattern, building on unit 2)
